notes: Level 3 manual review override shard for spell indexes 60-66 in generated discovery row order.

tongues::vision_light_sound.issue: The detector matched hear/see wording, but Tongues is a communication and language-comprehension spell rather than a light, vision, or sound-area mechanic.
tongues::vision_light_sound.recommendedTemplateChange: Track under communication/language fields, not vision-light-sound fields.
tongues::vision_light_sound.recommendedJsonChange: Closed for this bucket; runtime utilityType is communication and the description now preserves spoken, signed, heard, and seen language modes.

tongues::message_or_communication.issue: Tongues grants understanding of spoken or signed languages and makes the target understandable to creatures that know at least one language, but runtime only has utilityType plus prose.
tongues::message_or_communication.recommendedTemplateChange: Add structured communication-language fields for understood modes, expressed modes, recipient eligibility, and hear/see requirements.
tongues::message_or_communication.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime communicationLanguage data instead of relying on description prose.

tongues::social_or_knowledge_effect.issue: Any creature that knows at least one language can understand the target if it can hear the speech or see the signing; the language-knowledge eligibility is not first-class.
tongues::social_or_knowledge_effect.recommendedTemplateChange: Add communication recipient eligibility fields such as requiresKnownLanguage and perceptionMode.
tongues::social_or_knowledge_effect.recommendedJsonChange: Add typed recipient filters for creatures that know at least one language and can hear or see the target's communication.

vampiric-touch::sustain_or_recast_action.issue: Until the spell ends, the caster can make the melee spell attack again on each turn as a Magic action against the same or different creature, but the current runtime does not model repeat attacks as granted actions.
vampiric-touch::sustain_or_recast_action.recommendedTemplateChange: Add sustained repeat-attack fields for action type, cadence, attack reuse, and target-retargeting permission.
vampiric-touch::sustain_or_recast_action.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime granted/repeat action data for the per-turn Magic action attack.

vampiric-touch::resource_or_consumption.issue: The detector matched Hit Points wording, but Vampiric Touch restores HP from damage dealt and does not spend, consume, or create a tracked resource.
vampiric-touch::resource_or_consumption.recommendedTemplateChange: Track the mechanic under healing/life-drain fields instead of resource fields.
vampiric-touch::resource_or_consumption.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by adding a typed HEALING effect for half the Necrotic damage dealt.

vampiric-touch::healing_or_restoration.issue: On a hit, the caster regains Hit Points equal to half the Necrotic damage dealt; this was missing from runtime effects.
vampiric-touch::healing_or_restoration.recommendedTemplateChange: No new field required for this pass; structured Effect Type now includes HEALING.
vampiric-touch::healing_or_restoration.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by adding a HEALING effect with a custom formula tied to half the Necrotic damage dealt.

vampiric-touch::object_stats_or_damageab.issue: The detector matched Hit Points wording, but this is creature healing and not object AC, HP, or damageability.
vampiric-touch::object_stats_or_damageab.recommendedJsonChange: Track under the typed HEALING effect.

vampiric-touch::conditional_ending.issue: The cited 'Until the spell ends' wording gates the repeat attack by the normal spell duration and does not introduce a special ending condition.
vampiric-touch::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: No runtime conditional-ending data required beyond duration/concentration.

wall-of-sand::terrain_or_surface.issue: The wall must be on the ground, blocks line of sight but not movement, and costs 3 feet of movement for every 1 foot moved in its space; runtime has wall dimensions but no typed movement-cost multiplier or ground placement rule.
wall-of-sand::terrain_or_surface.recommendedTemplateChange: Add terrain obstruction fields for ground placement, line-of-sight blocking, movement passability, and movement-cost multiplier.
wall-of-sand::terrain_or_surface.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime terrain/wall obstruction data for 3-for-1 movement cost and line-of-sight blocking.

wall-of-sand::vision_light_sound.issue: The wall blocks line of sight, and creatures are Blinded while in its space; runtime has Blinded but does not type the wall's line-of-sight blocking separately.
wall-of-sand::vision_light_sound.recommendedTemplateChange: Add opaque/blocks-line-of-sight fields for area hazards and structures.
wall-of-sand::vision_light_sound.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime sightObstruction or wallProperties data for line-of-sight blocking.

wall-of-sand::created_object_or_structur.issue: The detector matched wall creation and dimensions; structured markdown and JSON already carry the 30-foot length, 10-foot height, and 10-foot thickness as spatial form data.
wall-of-sand::created_object_or_structur.recommendedTemplateChange: No new structure-dimension field required for this spell.
wall-of-sand::created_object_or_structur.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by existing spatialDetails and areaOfEffect fields.

wall-of-sand::status_or_state_change.issue: Creatures are Blinded while in the wall's space; runtime has the Blinded condition, but it cannot express that the condition is location-dependent and ends when the creature leaves the wall.
wall-of-sand::status_or_state_change.recommendedTemplateChange: Add area-scoped condition fields for conditions that apply only while occupying an area.
wall-of-sand::status_or_state_change.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime status scope data such as appliesWhileInArea and endsOnExit.

wall-of-sand::conditional_ending.issue: The wall vanishes when the spell ends, which is normal duration behavior and not a separate conditional ending.
wall-of-sand::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: No runtime conditional-ending data required beyond duration/concentration.

wall-of-sand::aftermath_or_memory.issue: The wall vanishing at spell end leaves no persistent aftermath or memory state.

wall-of-water::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: Ranged weapon attacks that enter the wall's space have disadvantage, and fire damage is halved if the fire effect passes through the wall; both are only in utility prose.
wall-of-water::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: Add wall-interaction modifier fields for ranged weapon attack disadvantage and damage-type reduction through the wall.
wall-of-water::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime attackThroughArea and damageThroughArea modifier data.

wall-of-water::terrain_or_surface.issue: The wall's space is difficult terrain, cold damage can freeze 5-foot-square sections, and destroyed frozen sections leave gaps that water does not refill; runtime only stores most of this in prose.
wall-of-water::terrain_or_surface.recommendedTemplateChange: Add terrain/wall state fields for difficult terrain, freeze transformation, section size, and non-refill gaps.
wall-of-water::terrain_or_surface.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime terrain plus section-state data for difficult terrain and frozen/destroyed sections.

wall-of-water::vision_light_sound.issue: The detector matched 'point you can see within range', which is normal line-of-sight targeting already represented by Line of Sight true.

wall-of-water::created_object_or_structu.issue: The straight and ringed wall forms are typed, but cold-created frozen wall sections with AC, HP, destruction, and non-refill gaps are not first-class structure states.
wall-of-water::created_object_or_structu.recommendedTemplateChange: Add destructible section fields for created or transformed wall portions.
wall-of-water::created_object_or_structu.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime destructibleSections data for frozen 5-foot-square sections.

wall-of-water::resource_or_consumption.issue: The detector matched water not refilling a destroyed frozen section, but this is a structure-state gap rather than a resource or consumption mechanic.
wall-of-water::resource_or_consumption.recommendedTemplateChange: Track under destructible wall section state fields.
wall-of-water::resource_or_consumption.recommendedJsonChange: Track under destructibleSections/nonRefillGap data once that bucket is implemented.

wall-of-water::object_stats_or_damageabi.issue: Each 5-foot-square frozen section has AC 5 and 15 Hit Points and is destroyed at 0 HP; runtime has no typed destructible-section stats.
wall-of-water::object_stats_or_damageabi.recommendedTemplateChange: Add object/section AC, HP, size, and destroyed-at-zero fields.
wall-of-water::object_stats_or_damageabi.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime destructible section stats for frozen wall portions.

wall-of-water::environmental_change.issue: Cold damage passing through the wall freezes part of it, fire damage through it is halved, and destroyed sections remain empty; these environmental interactions are only prose.
wall-of-water::environmental_change.recommendedTemplateChange: Add environmental interaction fields keyed by damage type and pass-through condition.
wall-of-water::environmental_change.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime environmentalInteractions data for cold freezing, fire halving, and destroyed-section gaps.

wall-of-water::conditional_ending.issue: The wall vanishes when the spell ends, which is normal duration behavior and not a separate conditional ending.
wall-of-water::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: No runtime conditional-ending data required beyond duration/concentration.

wall-of-water::aftermath_or_memory.issue: The wall vanishing at spell end leaves no persistent aftermath or memory state.

water-breathing::choice_or_mode.issue: The detector matched 'of your choice', but the meaningful count mechanic is already captured as up to ten targets.
water-breathing::choice_or_mode.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by existing multi targeting with maxTargets 10.

water-breathing::created_object_or_struc.issue: The detector matched 'grants ... ability', but Water Breathing creates no object or structure.

water-breathing::resource_or_consumption.issue: The detector matched breathing wording, but the spell grants an environmental capability and does not consume a resource.
water-breathing::resource_or_consumption.recommendedTemplateChange: Track underwater respiration under environmental/adaptation capability fields, not resource fields.

water-breathing::environmental_change.issue: Targets gain the ability to breathe underwater while retaining normal respiration; runtime stores this as utility prose without typed environmental adaptation fields.
water-breathing::environmental_change.recommendedTemplateChange: Add environmental adaptation fields for underwater breathing and retained normal respiration.
water-breathing::environmental_change.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime environmentalAdaptation data for underwater breathing plus normal respiration retained.

water-breathing::conditional_ending.issue: The underwater breathing lasts until the spell ends, which is normal duration behavior and not a separate conditional ending.
water-breathing::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: No runtime conditional-ending data required beyond duration.

water-walk::choice_or_mode.issue: The detector matched 'of your choice', but the meaningful count mechanic is already captured as up to ten targets.
water-walk::choice_or_mode.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by existing multi targeting with maxTargets 10.

water-walk::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The detector matched Bonus Action wording, but Water Walk does not modify attacks, saves, or checks.
water-walk::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: Track the Bonus Action transition under granted/sustained action or movement-mode fields.
water-walk::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Closed for this bucket by adding a granted Bonus Action entry to runtime utility data.

water-walk::terrain_or_surface.issue: Targets can move across any liquid surface as harmless solid ground, with lava heat still damaging them, but runtime stores liquid-surface movement only as utility prose.
water-walk::terrain_or_surface.recommendedTemplateChange: Add movement-surface adaptation fields for liquid-surface walking, surface examples, harmless-ground treatment, and retained heat damage exceptions.
water-walk::terrain_or_surface.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime surfaceMovement data for liquid surfaces and damage exceptions.

water-walk::created_object_or_structure.issue: The detector matched 'solid ground' wording, but the spell does not create an object or structure; it changes how targets interact with liquid surfaces.

water-walk::resource_or_consumption.issue: The detector matched liquid examples, but Water Walk spends no resource and consumes no tracked quantity.

water-walk::environmental_change.issue: The spell changes the target's interaction with liquids, including water, acid, mud, snow, quicksand, and lava, while preserving lava heat damage; runtime has no typed environmental adaptation.
water-walk::environmental_change.recommendedTemplateChange: Add environmental adaptation fields for liquid traversal and hazardous-liquid exceptions.
water-walk::environmental_change.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime environmentalAdaptation data for liquid traversal plus lava heat damage exception.

water-walk::conditional_ending.issue: The detector matched the Bonus Action transition and fall-through exception, but neither is a spell-ending condition.
water-walk::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: Track under surface transition action fields.
water-walk::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: Closed for this bucket by adding a granted Bonus Action entry; no conditional-ending data required.

wind-wall::choice_or_mode.issue: The detector matched point choice and wall-shaping choice; dimensions and continuous-path shaping are already present in structured spatial form notes and runtime spatialDetails.
wind-wall::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: No choice-or-mode field required for this spell.

wind-wall::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The initial Strength save for 4d8 Bludgeoning damage with half damage on success is already typed in structured markdown and runtime JSON.
wind-wall::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: No attack/save modifier field required for the initial damage.
wind-wall::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by existing DAMAGE effect with Strength save and saveEffect half.

wind-wall::terrain_or_surface.issue: The wall rises from the ground, follows one continuous path along the ground, and blocks certain creatures, objects, gases, and projectiles; runtime has spatial notes and utility controlOptions but no typed passability/filter rules.
wind-wall::terrain_or_surface.recommendedTemplateChange: Add wall passability/filter fields for ground pathing, gas blocking, flying-size blocking, projectile deflection, and unaffected projectile exceptions.
wind-wall::terrain_or_surface.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime wallInteraction data instead of relying on controlOptions prose.

wind-wall::created_object_or_structure.issue: Wall dimensions and continuous-path shaping are already represented in structured markdown and runtime spatialDetails.
wind-wall::created_object_or_structure.recommendedTemplateChange: No new structure-dimension field required for this spell.
wind-wall::created_object_or_structure.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by existing areaOfEffect and spatialDetails fields.

wind-wall::ward_alarm_or_trigger.issue: Loose lightweight materials fly upward and ordinary projectiles launched at targets behind the wall miss automatically, with heavy/siege projectile exceptions; runtime now preserves these as utility controlOptions but lacks filterable projectile/material rules.
wind-wall::ward_alarm_or_trigger.recommendedTemplateChange: Add ward/interception fields for ordinary projectile auto-miss, lightweight material updraft, and exception filters.
wind-wall::ward_alarm_or_trigger.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime interception/projectileFilter data instead of prose-only controlOptions.

wind-wall::environmental_change.issue: Strong wind keeps fog, smoke, and gases at bay and prevents gaseous-form creatures from passing; runtime now preserves this as utility controlOptions but lacks typed gas and form passability fields.
wind-wall::environmental_change.recommendedTemplateChange: Add environmental barrier fields for gas/smoke/fog blocking and gaseous-form passability.
wind-wall::environmental_change.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime environmentalBarrier data for gases and gaseous-form creatures.

water-breathing::target_filter_or_eligib.issue: Water Breathing affects up to ten willing creatures, but runtime targeting only says creatures and has no willing-target eligibility field.
water-breathing::target_filter_or_eligib.recommendedTemplateChange: Add willing-target eligibility fields to targeting filters.
water-breathing::target_filter_or_eligib.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime target filter data for willing creatures.

water-walk::target_filter_or_eligibility.issue: Water Walk affects up to ten willing creatures, but runtime targeting only says creatures and has no willing-target eligibility field.
water-walk::target_filter_or_eligibility.recommendedTemplateChange: Add willing-target eligibility fields to targeting filters.
water-walk::target_filter_or_eligibility.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime target filter data for willing creatures.
